name: Sweet Potato Biscuits 3
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Well mashed, cooked sweet potato
1/3 cup Finely chopped walnuts or pecans
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. In a mixing bowl, sift together the flours, baking powder, and salt.
3. Work in the margarine until the mixture resembles coarse breadcrumbs.
4. Add apple juice, potato, honey, and nuts; work until it resembles a soft dough.
5. Turn dough out onto a well-floured board and knead enough extra flour to make the dough lose its stickiness.
6. With floured hands, divide dough into 16 equal portions.
7. Shape into small balls and arrange on a lightly oiled cookie sheet, patting them down a bit to flatten them.
8. Bake for 12 to 15 minutes. Serve hot with Creamy Mushroom Soup.
